chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 861 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.3775/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.3776/2025 (Ex./A) 4. For orders on CMA No.3777/2025 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 05.06.2025 Mr. Ashok Kumar K. Jamba, Advocate for petitioners..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 5. Through this petition, the petitioners have challenged warrant of arrest issued by Banking Court, Ghotki, available at Page-15 of the petition. Learned Counsel for the petitioners submits that the petitioners are ready to approach Banking Court, Ghotki to proceed with the matter in accordance with law; however, the warrant of arrest issued by the Banking Court concerned comes in the way and the petitioners have apprehension that they might be arrested. In view of the above, warrant of arrest issued by Banking Court, Ghotki against the petitioners is hereby suspended for a period of three weeks, enabling the petitioners to approach Banking Court, Ghotki for redressal of their grievance, subject to furnishing a P.R. bond in the sum of Rs.5,000/- (Rupees five thousand) each to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
